footer.description: We transform ideas into digital solutions. Custom-made software to drive your business forward.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text1: At EZSolutions S.A.S, we collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you complete our contact form, request information about our services, or communicate with us through any means.
privacy.section1Text2: The information may include: full name, email address, phone number, company name, and any other data you decide to provide to us.
privacy.section2Text: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.section2Item1: Respond to your inquiries and requests
privacy.section2Item3: Improve our services and user experience
privacy.section2Item4: Send communications related to our services (with your consent)
privacy.section3Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include data encryption, restricted access, and updated security protocols.
privacy.section4Text: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:
privacy.section4Item4: With service providers who help us operate our business
privacy.section5Text: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, or limit the use of your personal data. To exercise these rights, you can contact us through our contact form or by sending an email to privacy@ezsolutions.com.
privacy.section6Text: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect some site functionalities.
privacy.section7Text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the date of last update.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using the website of EZSolutions S.A.S, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, we recommend that you do not use our website or our services.
terms.section2Text: EZSolutions S.A.S offers custom software development services, including but not limited to:
terms.section3Text1: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe upon the rights of others or restrict or inhibit anyone's use and enjoyment of the website.
terms.section3Item1: Using the site for illegal or unauthorized activities
terms.section3Item2: Attempting to access restricted areas of the site
terms.section3Item3: Transmitting viruses or other malicious code
terms.section4Text: All content on this website, including texts, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of EZSolutions S.A.S or its licensors and is protected by Colombian intellectual property laws and international treaties.
terms.section5Text: Specific software development services will be subject to individual contracts that will establish the particular terms, including scope, deadlines, costs, and delivery conditions. These contracts will prevail over these general terms in case of conflict.
terms.section6Text: EZSolutions S.A.S will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services. Our total liability will not exceed the amount paid for the services in question.
terms.section7Text: We provide quality warranties on our developments as specified in each individual contract. The period and scope of the warranty will be determined in the corresponding service agreement.
terms.section8Text: These terms will be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Colombia. Any dispute will be submitted to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Colombia.
terms.section9Text: EZSolutions S.A.S reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will become effective immediately after publication on the website. Your continued use of the site after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section10Text: For any questions about these Terms of Service, you can contact us through our contact form or by sending an email to legal@ezsolutions.com
